section_title: INTRODUCTION TO VOL. 12 AND MEXICAN PESO EXAMPLE
content:
Welcome back folks. This is video number 12 in our continuing series of 20 videos for the ICT optimal trade
entry pattern recognition series. Today's example is a commodity futures, and it's a Mexican peso. We
already have our chart trained on the 5-minute. Take a look at what you see here before I put the
annotations on. Pause the video.

section_title: OPTIMAL TRADE ENTRY (OTE) ANALYSIS FOR MEXICAN PESO
content:
We'll add our annotations. Here's yesterday's high, Thursday's daily high. During the New York session, we
have an optimal trade entry in here. You'd see 1/2 standard deviation, 1 full standard deviation takes us
above Thursday's daily high. Why don't have two is a little too rich for today, but that's okay. The model that
I'm teaching is simply looking at a run above previous day's high or below previous day's low. You can see
that there is a 47 pip opportunity here and a 4 to 1 reward to risk, so not a bad little trade.

You might want to take a look at the Canadian dollar today in your own study. There was an opportunity for
a continuation on the Dollar/CAD. It gave you an optimal trade entry today in the New York session, so I'll
leave that for your own personal study and homework. Until I talk to you next weekend, I wish you good
luck and good trading.
